message:
fix(doc): enable 5 previously-ignored doc tests

Convert from `ignore` to `no_run` (compile-checked):
- retry.rs: add async wrapper and concrete return type
- output/mod.rs: use actual API (detect_format, Style) instead of
  non-existent Renderer/PaneRenderer types
- wezterm.rs: add async wrapper for send_control example
- policy.rs: fix PolicyEngine::default() -> permissive(), add missing
  workflow_id arg, add async wrapper
- workflows.rs: fix async fn -> BoxFuture in Workflow trait impl

Doc test score: 57 pass / 0 fail / 3 ignored (was 52/0/8)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
